testcase.name: test_no_leak_on_auth_me

failure.message: AssertionError: dict_keys(['user_id', 'email', 'phone', 'name', 'picture', 'role', 'company_id', 'employee_code', 'position', 'onboarded', 'approval_status', 'has_pin', 'pin_must_change', 'pin_set_at', 'pin_reset_by', 'temp_pin_plaintext', 'temp_credentials_generated_at', 'created_at', 'password_must_change', 'password_set_at', 'password_reset_by', 'temp_password_plaintext', 'pin_fail_count', 'pin_last_login_at', 'pin_locked_until', 'pin_last_changed_at', 'password_fail_count', 'password_last_login_at', 'password_locked_until', 'password_set_by', 'company_name', 'company', 'offboarded', 'approval_pending', 'approval_rejected']) assert 'temp_pin_plaintext' not in {'user_id': 'user_a0ea08e2a9ed', 'email': 'qa_admin_0236ea@example.com', 'phone': '+91993160439', 'name': 'QA Admin 0236ea', ...}

testcase.failure: tests/test_iter49_temp_creds_and_roster.py:304: in test_no_leak_on_auth_me assert "temp_pin_plaintext" not in u, u.keys() E AssertionError: dict_keys(['user_id', 'email', 'phone', 'name', 'picture', 'role', 'company_id', 'employee_code', 'position', 'onboarded', 'approval_status', 'has_pin', 'pin_must_change', 'pin_set_at', 'pin_reset_by', 'temp_pin_plaintext', 'temp_credentials_generated_at', 'created_at', 'password_must_change', 'password_set_at', 'password_reset_by', 'temp_password_plaintext', 'pin_fail_count', 'pin_last_login_at', 'pin_locked_until', 'pin_last_changed_at', 'password_fail_count', 'password_last_login_at', 'password_locked_until', 'password_set_by', 'company_name', 'company', 'offboarded', 'approval_pending', 'approval_rejected']) E assert 'temp_pin_plaintext' not in {'user_id': 'user_a0ea08e2a9ed', 'email': 'qa_admin_0236ea@example.com', 'phone': '+91993160439', 'name': 'QA Admin 0236ea', ...}

testcase.name: test_no_leak_on_admin_employees

failure.message:
AssertionError: LEAK: /admin/employees returns temp_pin_plaintext assert 'temp_pin_plaintext' not in "{'employees...08e2a9ed'}]}"
'temp_pin_plaintext' is contained here: ? ^^ {'employees': ...
...Full output truncated (2 lines hidden), use '-vv' to show

testcase.failure: tests/test_iter49_temp_creds_and_roster.py:316: in test_no_leak_on_admin_employees assert "temp_pin_plaintext" not in body_text, "LEAK: /admin/employees returns temp_pin_plaintext" E AssertionError: LEAK: /admin/employees returns temp_pin_plaintext E assert 'temp_pin_plaintext' not in "{'employees...08e2a9ed'}]}" E E 'temp_pin_plaintext' is contained here: E ? ^^ E {'employees': ... E E ...Full output truncated (2 lines hidden), use '-vv' to show
